steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says Gogol carves his name into clay and leaves his signature in paint — both describe making a visible mark.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Choice A, Marks, means to make a visible indication, which fits both verbs. The other three either describe passing, turning, or following, none of which convey making a mark. That matches choice A — A is correct.
